# Aspect Real Estate Partners

> Orange County commercial real estate brokers based in Irvine, California. Aspect Real Estate Partners represents corporate occupiers, landlords and investors with tenant representation, landlord representation, investment sales, corporate services and a dedicated Distressed Assets Group.

## Key facts
- Location: 17682 Mitchell N, Suite 206, Irvine, CA 92614
- Phone: 949-200-8327
- Email: info@aspectrep.com
- Service area: Orange County and Southern California
- Listings: https://www.lee-associates.com/newportbeach/listings/
- 75+ years of combined commercial real estate experience; 500+ transactions
- CoStar "Power Broker" Quarterly Deals award winners (Q4 2021, Irvine)

## Services
- Tenant Representation: exclusive representation of business tenants at no cost to the tenant — all brokerage fees are covered by the landlord. Property search, market research, location advice and lease negotiation.
- Landlord Representation: personalized strategic marketing to stabilize occupancy and maximize rents, producing cash-flowing assets.
- Investment Sales: acquisitions and dispositions for institutions, REITs and private investors — single-tenant net leases, multi-family, hotels, industrial parks and corporate headquarters; sale-leaseback structuring and financing guidance.
- Corporate Services: aligning real estate, facilities and workplace strategy with the corporate business plan; acting as an extension of the client's real estate department.
- Distressed Assets Group: acquisition, restructuring, stabilizing and revitalization of distressed commercial properties, portfolios, debt and businesses, backed by $500M+ in family office capital.

## Team
- Gary Abraham — Managing Director, Co-Founder (Brokerage)
- David Girty — Managing Director, Co-Founder (Brokerage), 300+ deals, $1B+ value
- David Stassel — Managing Director (Investment Sales)
- Nicholas Sefarian — Director (Brokerage)
- Montserrat Wilson — Senior Associate (Brokerage)
- Gavin Haimovitz — Associate (Brokerage)
- Karin Tucker — Associate (Brokerage)
- David Schumacher — Managing Director (Distressed Assets Group)

## Clients
Aspect has represented restaurants, gyms, professional firms, non-profits and institutional investors including The Tax Law Offices of David W. Klasing, The Goldfinch, Terrace by Mix Mix, Seaview Lutheran Plaza, Shopoff Realty Investments, Transwestern Investment Company and many more. Testimonials: https://aspectrep.getdigitaldone.co.uk/clients.html
